debug_info.goal:
x y z : ℝ
h₀ : 0 ≤ x ∧ 0 ≤ y ∧ 0 ≤ z
h₁ : x + y + z = 1
⊢ 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ∧ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ 7 / 27

proof:
constructor
  · rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
    have : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z = x * y * (1 - z) + y * z * (1 - x) + z * x * (1 - y) + x * y * z := by ring
    rw [this]
    apply add_nonneg
    · apply add_nonneg
      · apply add_nonneg
        · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hx hy) (by linarith)
        · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hy hz) (by linarith)
      · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hz hx) (by linarith)
    · exact mul_nonneg (mul_nonneg hx hy) hz
  · rcases h₀ with ⟨hx, hy, hz⟩
    have hf : y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z = x * y * (1 - 2 * z) + z * (x + y) := by ring
    rw [hf, show x + y = 1 - z by linarith]
    by_cases h_z_le : z ≤ 1 / 2
    · have hxy : x * y ≤ (1 - z) ^ 2 / 4 := by
        rw [← sub_nonneg, show (1 - z) ^ 2 / 4 - x * y = (x - y) ^ 2 / 4 by { rw [show 1 - z = x + y by linarith]; ring }]
        apply div_nonneg (pow_two_nonneg _) (by linarith)
      have : x * y * (1 - 2 * z) + z * (1 - z) ≤ (1 - z) ^ 2 / 4 * (1 - 2 * z) + z * (1 - z) := by
        apply add_le_add_right
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hxy (by linarith)
      apply this.trans
      rw [← sub_nonneg, show (7 : ℝ) / 27 - ((1 - z) ^ 2 / 4 * (1 - 2 * z) + z * (1 - z)) = (3 * z - 1) ^ 2 * (6 * z + 1) / 108 by ring]
      apply div_nonneg (mul_nonneg (pow_two_nonneg _) (by linarith)) (by linarith)
    · have : x * y * (1 - 2 * z) + z * (1 - z) ≤ 0 + 1 / 4 := by
        apply add_le_add
        · exact mul_nonpos_of_nonneg_of_nonpos (mul_nonneg hx hy) (by linarith)
        · rw [← sub_nonneg, show (1 : ℝ) / 4 - z * (1 - z) = (z - 1 / 2) ^ 2 by ring]
          apply pow_two_nonneg
      exact this.trans (by norm_num)
successful_attempts:
